item.name: IAM-GRP-CR-CRUD-OK — Create group in accountAId → Operation(iop) done → Get confirms id prefix `grp`

exec: if (v !== undefined && v !== null) pm.environment.set('opId', String(v));
if (v !== undefined && v !== null) pm.environment.set('crudGroupId', String(v));
// bounded read-your-writes retry over the owner-tuple materialization window
// (opgate removed -> eventual-consistency); retries SELF only on 403/404.

IAM-GRP-CR-AUTHZ-ANON-DENY — Create group as anonymous → 401 Unauthenticated

exec: let j; try { j = pm.response.json(); } catch(e) { j = null; }
pm.test('ANON: grpc code 16 (UNAUTHENTICATED)', () => pm.expect(j && j.code, JSON.stringify(j)).to.equal(16));
